scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (reservations, guests, units, owners). Track PMS write endpoints (create/update reservation, guest, unit) are out of scope for this migration (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

destructive delete not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
